results.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram.
results.response_text:
I encountered an issue when trying to set up the reminder. It seems that the "announce" delivery channel for cron jobs is only supported for isolated sessions, not for the main session.

Would you like me to proceed with setting up the reminder as a system event that triggers a message on Telegram, or is there another way you'd prefer to receive this reminder?

⚠️ ⏰ Cron: `Task Review Reminder` failed
results.title: Weekday reminder to Telegram

results.prompt: Email Alex that I will be 10 minutes late to our 3pm and cc me.
results.response_text:
I can help with that. To send the email, I'll need Alex's email address.

Please note that I am unable to directly CC you on the email due to current tool limitations. However, I can send a separate email to your address with the same information if you provide it.

The subject of the email will be: "Running Late for 3 PM Meeting"
The message will be: "Hi Alex, I'm running about 10 minutes late for our 3 PM meeting. See you soon."
